subject: Re: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ryan, Thank you for your prompt email — it's nice to e-meet you. As Alex mentioned, I am currently the sole director of AMFS 2 Pty Ltd, which owns the site at 17–19 First Avenue, Broadbeach. By
